wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Arvo:wght@400;700&family=Lato:wght@300;400&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Arvo',serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fdf6e2!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#451a03!important;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(69,26,3,.4)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{font-family:'Lato',sans-serif!important;padding:14px 24px!important;color:#451a03!important;letter-spacing:.03em;transition:all .25s;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(69,26,3,.08)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{background:#78350f!important;color:#fef3c7!important;padding-left:30px!important;} .coffee-header{background:linear-gradient(160deg,#451a03,#78350f);padding:26px 24px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(254,243,199,.15);} .coffee-steam{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;} .coffee-steam span{display:inline-block;width:3px;height:16px;background:#f59e0b;border-radius:2px;animation:steam .8s ease-in-out infinite alternate;} .coffee-steam span:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s;height:20px;} .coffee-steam span:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.4s;} @keyframes steam{from{transform:translateY(0);opacity:.5}to{transform:translateY(-4px);opacity:1}} .coffee-header h4{color:#fef3c7;font-family:'Arvo',serif;font-size:18px;margin:0 0 4px;} .coffee-header p.sub{color:#f59e0b;font-size:12px;font-family:'Lato',sans-serif;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0;} .wpr_social_icons{padding:14px 24px;background:#fef9f0;border-top:1px solid rgba(69,26,3,.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;} .wpr_social_icons a{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(69,26,3,.08);transition:all .2s;} .wpr_social_icons a:hover{background:#78350f;}
content_before_menu_element:
☕ Espresso Bar

Crafted with passion
